title: Howls Moving Castle Ghibli Taste Tales
description: Join us for an enchanting evening of Ghibli-inspired food and storytelling at Ghibli Taste & Tales presents Howl's Moving Castle! Welcome to Ghibli Taste & Tales presents Howl's Moving Castle! Join us for a magical evening filled with enchanting stories and delectable dishes inspired by Studio Ghibli's masterpiece, Howl's Moving Castle. This in-person event will be held at Blossoms Cocktail Bar and Restaurant, where you'll be transported into the whimsical world of Howl and Sophie. Immerse yourself in the fantastical ambiance, indulge in themed cocktails and gourmet bites, and relive the charm of this beloved film with fellow fans. Don't miss this unique opportunity to experience the magic of Ghibli in real life! There are three magical courses to dive yourself in to, fettered with two cocktails to quench your thirst throughout this experience. (Non-alcoholic cocktails available). Vegan/vegetarian options available.
